note: This is the LIVE deployed (committed) site. The handoff flags uncommitted local edits to index.html + cases.json that are NOT deployed and are NOT reflected here (separate keep/revert/cherry-pick decision).
title: Ajolote Labs: AI brain and AI employees for your company
metaDescription: We build the brain that unifies your stack, the AI employees who run on it, and train your team to manage them.
heroH1: Stop losing money to manual operations.
heroSubhead: On the first call we map what you run. Then we embed engineers who build the AI that runs it — and we stay to keep building.

heroDeliverableCard.label: FINAL STATE
rows: one brain — every system you run · unified · queryable · audited
multi-LLM — frontier models for reasoning · open source to optimize token cost · routed by task
agents — scoped · audited · replaceable · never a black box
tools + MCPs — into the systems you already pay for · no rip-and-replace
heroDeliverableCard.footer: when we leave: the code is yours · the data is yours · the system runs

allHeadings.text: Stop losing money to manual operations.
We embed. We build. We support it.

services.h2: We embed. We build. We support it.

layers.title: The Brain
layers.body: We unify every tool you already pay for into one interface your AI can read and act on. Privacy, consent, and audit wired in from day one.
layers.label: LAYER 01/03 · OUTPUT BRAIN

layers.title: AI Employees
layers.body: Agents that do real work across your operation: booking, forecasting, reconciling, negotiating, reporting. They run 24/7 on your brain, in your natural language.
layers.label: LAYER 02/03 · OUTPUT EMPLOYEES

layers.title: Power Users
layers.body: Your team learns to command, customize, and deploy agents themselves. Ajolote supports as you grow the system across every corner of the company.
layers.label: LAYER 03/03 · OUTPUT GROWING

cases.subhead: Two FDE engagements in production: cross-border CPG and enterprise loyalty.

cards.title: Cross-Border Spirits
cards.desc: Built the infrastructure and brain that detects inefficiencies in the cross-border supply chain CPG brands face exporting spirits to the US.

cards.title: Loyalty Platform
cards.desc: Led an AI-native turnaround — deployed a company brain where AI agents detect new workflows, automate them, and compound in capability.

fonts.mono: JetBrains Mono (used for SEC_xx kickers + LAYER/OUTPUT labels — inferred from mono labels; verify)

layout: Single-page scroll-snap; 3 sections (#hero, #services, #cases) each ~one viewport; reveal-gated content via IntersectionObserver
animVerdict: No animation library. Only first-party script is /js/main.js?v=hero-c3-mobile-5. Motion = native CSS transitions + IntersectionObserver reveals + count-up (data-counter) + bar-fill. Confirmed: no gsap/framer/lenis/lottie/three in window globals or scripts.
